HowTo.title: 💡 How to Use
HowTo.subtitle: Two focused steps to go from a source-language keyword to high-traffic, intent-matched local terms.
HowTo.step1a: Choose your source language and target country
HowTo.step1b: Enter a seed keyword that describes your topic or product
HowTo.step1c: Click "Discover Keywords" to run the analysis
HowTo.step1d: The tool translates your keyword and uses Ahrefs to find <highlight>real search terms used in the target market</highlight>.
HowTo.step2a: Pick the highest-volume keyword that matches your intent
HowTo.step2b: Click <hl>Deep Analysis</hl> for full data + all related terms (when available).
HowTo.proBody: Direct translations are often not what target-market users actually search for. For example, Robot Lawn Mower translates to German Roboter-Rasenmäher (only ~70 searches/mo), but German users search mähroboter (tens of thousands/mo). Ahrefs-backed suggestions surface the real high-traffic keywords.

Seo.s1title: Why Direct Translation Isn't Enough for International SEO
Seo.s1p1: When executing cross-border e-commerce or global content marketing, many marketers make a fatal mistake: plugging their native keywords into a translation tool and using the literal results. This rarely works because
Seo.s1b1: While an English speaker searches for "Cheap Flights," a French user might search for "Vols Low Cost" rather than "Vols Bon Marché."
Seo.s1b2: When buying a laptop, German users search for "Notebook" far more frequently than "Laptop."
Seo.s1b3: Many users omit diacritics or use specific abbreviations when searching.
Seo.s1callout: Our tool utilizes AI to deeply analyze the real search habits and cultural nuances of your target country, helping you discover <highlight>high-potential, localized keywords.</highlight>
Seo.s2title: Who Needs a Multi-Language Keyword Explorer?
Seo.s2p1: Whether you are a beginner running a Shopify store or an experienced SEO expert, this tool will save you
Seo.s2i1: Uncover "blue ocean" product keywords in niche markets, optimize your product listings, and lower your CPC.
Seo.s2i2: Understand the exact questions users are asking. Create articles that perfectly match local search intent.
Seo.s2i3: Generate multi-language keyword reports with a single click. Export directly to CSV.
Seo.faq0q: Are your Search Volume and Keyword Difficulty (KD) data accurate?
Seo.faq0a: Yes. Our metrics connect via API to authoritative global SEO databases. This ensures that the search volume and competition difficulty you see accurately reflect the current reality of your target market.
Seo.faq1q: What is "Search Intent," and why is it crucial for multi-language SEO?
Seo.faq1a: Search intent is the primary goal a user has when typing a query. Our tool uses AI to identify the intent behind your original keyword and matches it with vocabulary in the target language that shares that exact same intent, boosting your conversion rates.
Seo.faq2q: Which languages and countries does this tool support?
Seo.faq2a: We support 50+ countries worldwide. Beyond mainstream languages, we excel at handling niche languages with complex cultural contexts, such as Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and Vietnamese.
Seo.faq3q: What is the difference between the Free version and the VIP version?
Seo.faq3a: Free visitors can experience our core AI intent-mining features for a limited number of countries. Upgrading to VIP allows unlimited simultaneous country queries and one-click CSV exports.
